message:
test(frankenpandas): add Sorting integration test (br-50ng9 / fd90.166)

fd90.166: locks in coverage for the README's 'Sorting' section
(lines 1192-1206). Builds a 4-row DataFrame and a Series with NaN
and verifies:
  - df.sort_values('price', true)? → ascending: 10 first
  - df.sort_values('price', false)? → descending: 50 first
  - series.sort_values_na(true, 'first')? → NaN at position 0
  - series.sort_values_na(true, 'last')? → NaN at last position
  - df.sort_index(true)? / df.sort_index(false)?

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 12 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
